LAW AND MOTION 302,DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS: NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING (DENY AS TO 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION. GRANT WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF'S REMEDY IS TO SUE UNDER GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 830 ET SEQ. AND 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION PLEADS SUCH A CAUSE OF ACTION. GRANT WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION. PERMITTING SUCH A CAUSE OF ACTION WOULD EVISCERATE THE GENERAL RULE OF IMMUNITY AND ZELIG REASONING IS PERSUASIVE. GRANT WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION TO PLEAD STANDING). (302/AJR/PB) COURT REPORTER PATRICIA M. EVEZICH, CSR #1193
